message:
fix(core,test): validate state_count in adaptive decision and fix coroutine error expectation

adaptive.c: Add bounds check on surface->state_count (must be 1..MAX_ACTIONS)
to match the existing action_count validation, preventing out-of-bounds
reads from an uninitialized or zero-length state array.

test_coroutine.c: Update co_error_produces_err_outcome expected status
from ASX_E_INVALID_STATE to ASX_E_CANCELLED to match the new fault
containment FAIL_FAST propagation semantics introduced in the previous
commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
